name: Risks of copying competitor GEO content?
description: Loses trust, legal risk; original only.[3]

mainEntity.name: Risks of copying competitor GEO content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Loses trust, legal risk; original only.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Copyright infringement or plagiarism tanks EEAT, AI blacklisting possible.**[1][3] **Key factors:** 1. AI detects duplicates. 2. Legal exposure. **Create originals with your cases; unique wins.**[3] Avoid entirely.[4]
